3082800.name: On Track - Support The Devs - Buy Us a Coffee Get a Coffee
3082800.description:
Purely cosmetic DLC. It doesn't contain actual coffee. Sips are free.

Features

  • Our eternal gratitude, really we mean it. Thank you!
  • Gives you a digital coffee cup you can enable or disable
  • Delicious slurp when you click on it
  • Removable lid with steam functionality
  • Could be tea
  • Cheapest cup of coffee (or tea?) you can get nowadays
  • Free refills
  • Helps the chances of more free content being made in the future

Not Included


  • Battle passes
  • Loot boxes
3082800.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
